title: Crocodile Walks Away Confident
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on crocodile walks away confident, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Crocodile Walks Away Confident. Luffy survives his first loss to Crocodile and begins the long road back into the fight for Alabasta. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.
